name: cloudbox
description: Cloudflare-native synthetic workspaces for agents: files, collaborators, artifacts, receipts, and grading.

scripts.dev:worker: bun run build && bunx wrangler dev --local --port 8799
scripts.deploy: bun run build && bunx wrangler deploy
scripts.alchemy:deploy: bun run build && bun alchemy deploy --stage prod --adopt
scripts.check: bun run build && bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run demo:fast
